untranslatable_reason: HTF (High, Tight Flag) pattern detection requires candlestick shape analysis and trendline identification that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The pattern requires recognizing: (1) flag consolidation geometry, (2) trendline boundaries (not in allowed indicators), (3) relative positioning of wicks and body. The signal also lacks specific stop loss and profit target rules (marked AUTHOR_SILENT), making exit conditions speculative.
